chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3283 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 06.03.2025 Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. == Counsel for the petitioner called absent. No intimation is received. This matter pertains to year 2017 and has been pending since then. The learned AAG has filed statements of DIG and SSP along-with copy of FIR attached with the comments of SHO PS A-Section Dadu, taken on record. From perusal of the statements / comments of the official respondents, it appears that they have denied all the allegations leveled in the petition and there seems to be dispute of a civil nature which does not pertains to official respondents however, they have categorically stated that no harassment of any nature shall be caused to petitioner and they will act in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish *
